microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing complex workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, AI-native model serving distributed engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation product vertical with full lifecycle ownership.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, balancing speed, quality, and regulatory constraints across stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring prioritization cycles to cut planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly accelerating delivery speed across the resilience product vertical.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by conducting user demos and targeted training sessions that increased utilization across 14 key Azure engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly in manual development work.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ customer discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating complex technical pain points into prioritized, actionable requirements.

Improved data integrity and retrieval speed by **83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, enabling faster, more accurate lookups across enterprise engineering workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — driving hard tradeoff decisions across 140+ teams with competing roadmap priorities.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and delivering a roadmap to automate the highest-impact workflows.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and make data-driven prioritization calls by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams — turning raw workflow data into a strategic planning tool for the product org.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the full lifecycle of a legacy OS migration strategy — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and making fast tradeoff calls under tight delivery constraints.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake process, keeping engineering velocity high during a complex, multi-team platform transition.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs that had been bottlenecking the product release cadence.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer workflow — managing scoping, proposals, and invoicing for 200+ monthly jobs through a new CRM process that cut cycle time and improved conversion across the sales funnel.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google profile to target high-intent customers more efficiently.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting a **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that directly informed the company's pricing roadmap.

'Delivery speed' and 'ship faster' (Casca JD) reflected in microsoft_ft bullet#5 — AI agent outcome explicitly tied to accelerating delivery speed across the product vertical.

'Full lifecycle ownership' (Casca JD) mirrored in amazon_robotics bullet#1 — explicitly states 'owning the full lifecycle' of the migration strategy.
